detail.description: Dane Myers singles on a line drive to pitcher Joel Kuhnel.
Dane Myers doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas.
Dane Myers doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Bryan Torres. Spencer Steer scores.
Dane Myers homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Matt McLain scores. Ke'Bryan Hayes scores.
Dane Myers singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Willi Castro.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to center fielder Mickey Moniak.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to center fielder Bryce Teodosio. Noelvi Marte to 2nd.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to right fielder Jake Mangum. Eugenio Suárez to 3rd.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to left fielder Masataka Yoshida.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. TJ Friedl scores. Matt McLain to 2nd.
Dane Myers singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Victor Scott II.
Dane Myers singles on a sharp ground ball to third baseman José Fermín, deflected by shortstop Masyn Winn.
Dane Myers singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman José Fermín. Noelvi Marte to 3rd. Matt McLain to 2nd.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to third baseman Daniel Schneemann. Blake Dunn scores.
Dane Myers homers (3) on a fly ball to right field.
Dane Myers doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to left fielder MJ Melendez. Eugenio Suárez out at home on the throw, left fielder MJ Melendez to catcher Luis Torrens.
Dane Myers singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Tyler Freeman.
Dane Myers doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Dane Myers singles on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill. Eugenio Suárez to 2nd.
Dane Myers singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Dane Myers doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Blake Dunn scores.
Dane Myers homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Dane Myers singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Nick Gonzales. Spencer Steer to 3rd. Noelvi Marte to 2nd.
Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to second baseman Cole Young.
Dane Myers singles on a fly ball to center fielder Ryan Kreidler. Spencer Steer scores.
Dane Myers doubles (5) on a fly ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Sal Stewart scores.
